text: Here in the dim-lit hallway, shadows envelop the space and silence echoes off the glass. I feel an unsettling calm, my mind awakening to questions about the nature of emptiness in places built for people. Moving deeper, illuminated words on the wall speak to innovation and connection, yet the ethereal darkness makes me reflect on the paradoxes of modernity: we create spaces for collaboration, only to sometimes find ourselves alone with our thoughts. This solitude is at once alienating and inspiring—I feel both outside and deeply inside the phenomenon of progress.
